message:
Command `PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
echo "=== Project Root ===" && ls "$PROJECT_ROOT"
echo ""
echo "=== Checking design root ===" 
DESIGN_ROOT="${PROJECT_ROOT}/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
ls "$DESIGN_ROOT" 2>/dev/null || echo "NOT FOUND at $DESIGN_ROOT"

echo ""
echo "=== Checking nc_chipgen ===" && which nc_chipgen 2>/dev/null || echo "nc_chipgen not on PATH"
echo ""
echo "=== NC_LIB_ROOT candidates ===" && ls /opt/nc-lib 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/nativechips 2>/dev/null || ls /opt/nc 2>/dev/null || echo "Checking env vars..."; env | grep -i "nc_lib\|nc_root\|nativechips" || echo "No env vars found"` executed with exit code 0.
